_instructions: Copy this file to clients/<client-name>/config.json and fill in the values below.

client.description: One-sentence description of the client's business

qualification.ideal_customer_description: Describe the ideal customer profile in plain English. This gets injected into the AI qualification prompt.
qualification.service_focus: What specific AI/automation services are most relevant to this client's prospects?

custom_guidelines: Do NOT use phrases like 'I hope this email finds you well'

website_agent.gmaps_query: Example: 'plumbers in Dallas' or 'wedding venues in Sydney'
